2026-07-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a new FUSE_IO_URING_CMD_ADD_QUEUE command to the fuse-over-io-uring implementation, allowing servers to create queues explicitly and decoupling queue setup from entry registration. This is necessary for the subsequent addition of buffer pools to existing queues. The patch modifies the fuse_uring_create_queue function to take an additional flag indicating whether to fail if the queue already exists, and updates the fuse_uring_register function to use this new command when creating a queue lazily. The changes also include updates to error handling and logging in various places.
